name: georgringer/image-editor
description: Edit images directly in the TYPO3 file list using the Filerobot Image Editor.

scripts.build:update: cd Build && npm update && npm run build

scripts-descriptions.build:install: Install the npm dependencies for the Filerobot bundle (clean install from the lockfile) in Build/.
scripts-descriptions.build:update: Update the Filerobot npm dependencies and rebuild the vendored bundle.
